title: lithospermum rosei
intro: Lithospermum rosei, also known as Gromwell, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the western coast of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithospermum rosei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and can be used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
